description: Variant branches for The Hero's Journey. Contains optional/alternative paths that branch from and rejoin the core spine.

nodes.label: Refusal of the Call
nodes.definition: The protagonist hesitates or declines the call, revealing fear, obligation, or attachment to the ordinary world.
exit_conditions: An escalation or new event overrides the refusal
typical_variants: Disbelief that the call is real
failure_modes: Refusal lasts so long it stalls momentum

edges.label: Hero Refuses
edges.preconditions: Call has been received; character has reason to resist
edges.effects_on_stakes: Delays engagement, often causing the threat to worsen
edges.anti_patterns: Refusal has no consequences; nothing changes while the hero hesitates

edges.label: Refusal Overridden
edges.preconditions: Refusal is in place; an escalation occurs
edges.effects_on_stakes: Stakes increase because delay has worsened the problem
edges.effects_on_character: Character is compelled past their resistance
edges.common_alternatives: External force removes the option to refuse (e.g., home is destroyed)
edges.anti_patterns: Override is trivial; no cost to having refused
